name: orchestrators.zapier_webhook_post
description: Template: POST a governed runx payload to a Zapier Catch Hook webhook.

handoff_scope.description: Expected runx-to-Zapier handoff scope for receiver-side validation.

handoff_audience.description: Expected Zap audience for receiver-side validation.

event_id.description: Stable event id used by the workflow for deduplication.

source.description: Human-readable source label for the webhook receiver.

payload.description: JSON payload delivered in the POST body.
